findings.description: `BasicLogFormatter` (full class: `nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter`) appears in s2's log.properties configuration example but is absent from s2's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: writer.appFile.formatter.className=nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter in the log.properties code block under 'HTTPアクセスログの出力例'
